meaning: n.精纺毛纱,精纺毛料服装adj.精纺的
examples: For this reason, the firm could have difficulty snapping up insurance assets of rivals worsted by the crisis.
Worsted suits are nice and warm.
The poor fellows left commanding the old economy are ... nice guys, church deacons, pipe smokers, Wednesday-afternoon golfers, worsted clubmen and hearty backslappers.
Most serious collectors prefer more-refined "city carpets, " such as Iranian Ardabil rugs, made of 100% New Zealand worsted wool and boasting 150 to 200 knots per square inch.
